tweets.text: His claws are tied and he still looks like he’s about to ask for the manager. This isn’t a crab. This is seafood with legal representation. 🦀 https://t.co/flR8hto72x
tweets.name: Sunrise Lee

tweets.text: AI automation gets real when a workflow stops being a chat and becomes an inspectable loop. For a small business, the value is not one more prompt. It is checkpoints, memory, validation, and clear handoff points so the agent can keep moving without creating hidden risk.
tweets.name: Sunrise Lee
